title: GIS functions // improve maps functionalities
excerpt:

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday.com has the potential to be a great platform to visualise spatial data as a GIS/data vie software would do.
But there are no apps/integration to go further in that direction, and the functionalities of the map view are too limited. Some basic function such as grouping, coloring, sizing linked to the value of an item would already be great.

My question is: are there any developpement planned in this direction ?
Is there any interest for this in the community ?
The coming possibility to be able to load much larger items will lead to new cases and I think this is one of it.

Thanks
